message:
🐛 Fix tautological assertion in cluster investigation test (#10567)

Fixes #10534

The test asserted optionCount >= 0, which can never fail since .count()
always returns a non-negative integer. Changed to >= 1 to actually
verify filter options render.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
